detail.instructions: Implement Default for Config. Use http://localhost:8080, 32 max connections, and false for use_tls.

hints.body: Default returns Self from fn default() -> Self.
Use to_owned or String::from for the service URL.
Derive would use String::new and 0. Implement Default manually because this lesson needs local development values.

detail.completionExplanation: Default gives callers a clear starting point while keeping each field explicit. It is useful when most configuration values are optional overrides.
